svg.title: PDD three-gate workflow
svg.desc: PDD guides a coding agent from a rough idea through a launch packet, scope lock, and release map before mutation.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Three decision gates that keep coding agents from building or shipping the wrong thing.
